residualRisks: MockupPreviews is still a large composition file, although the repeated spec and gallery-control structures have now been extracted into exported shared surfaces.
Storybook build still emits upstream chunk-size and eval warnings from Storybook tooling, but the build completes successfully.
result.summary: Extracted shared mockup gallery controls and spec-list primitives out of page-local markup, moved the example app onto the shared controls surface, expanded the code/editor/diff family for metadata-heavy and one-sided states, added direct Storybook coverage for the new preview and code variants, and hardened key dark-mode and focus/contrast states across dense chat/docs/mock surfaces.
